page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Plant PTM Viewer is an integrative PTM resource that comprises approximately 370 000 PTM sites for 19 types of protein modifications in plant proteins from five different species.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Plant PTM Viewer is an integrative PTM resource that comprises approximately 370 000 PTM sites for 19 types of protein modifications in plant proteins from five different species.
